description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian, depicted in a standing pose with a natural human form. The figure has a proportionate build, with visible arms, legs, and a defined head, suggesting a typical adult physique. The clothing appears to be fitted and modern, with a clear distinction between upper and lower garments, and the silhouette is streamlined without bulky accessories. The posture is upright, with the arms resting naturally by the sides and the legs straight, indicating a neutral, relaxed stance. The footwear is distinct and appropriate for urban walking, and the hairstyle is short and neat, complementing the overall appearance. No carried objects or accessories are visible, emphasizing a simple, everyday urban pedestrian look.
description: A standing adult pedestrian with a proportionate build, modern fitted clothing, and a neutral upright posture. The figure has short hair, distinct footwear, and no visible accessories or carried objects.
description_view_0: The top of the head and shoulders are visible, showing the smooth contour of the head and upper body.
description_view_1: A side profile reveals the straight posture, arm alignment, and the outline of the legs and torso.
description_view_2: The lower body and feet are visible, highlighting the footwear and the stance of the legs.
description_view_3: Another side profile, similar to view 1, showing the opposite side of the body and the overall upright posture.
attribute_clothing_type: casual shirt and pants with standard urban outerwear
